response: Stay hydrated in style with our sleek, double-walled stainless steel water bottle that keeps drinks icy cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12. The leakproof, flip-top lid and wide mouth make sipping and cleaning effortless, while the durable, sweat-free finish fits perfectly in your hand and most cup holders. Whether you’re at the gym, office, or on a weekend hike, this bottle is your go-to companion for all-day refreshment.
